codeSystems.name: EDQM_Standard_Terms
codeSystems.title: EDQM Standard Terms
codeSystems.description: Standard terms published by the European Directorate for the Quality of Medicines & HealthCare (EDQM) for pharmaceutical dose forms, routes and methods of administration, containers, closures, administration devices and units of presentation.
